# Templix AI

> Templix AI offers free, professional document templates and an AI-powered editor. Create invoices, resumes, CVs, contracts, proposals, letters, reports, business plans and quotations — customize them online and export to PDF or Word, with no sign-up and no watermark. Primary audience: freelancers, small businesses and professionals in the US and India.

## Templates
- [Invoice templates](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/invoices): freelance, contractor, GST (India), proforma, commercial/export, consulting, milestone, timesheet and more — line-item tables that total themselves.
- [Resume & CV templates](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/resumes): ATS-friendly resumes and CVs from fresher/entry-level to executive and academic.
- [Contract & agreement templates](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/contracts): freelance, employment, NDA, rental/lease, roommate, partnership and social-media management agreements.
- [Proposal templates](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/proposals): business, project, marketing, one-page and cleaning-services proposals.
- [Letter & email templates](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/letters): resignation, cover, salary increment, leave application, No Objection Certificate (NOC), payment reminder and reference-request letters.
- [Report templates](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/reports): weekly status, internship, incident, expense, lab and book reports.
- [Business plan templates](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/business-plans): one-page, lean canvas and full investor-ready plans.
- [Quotation templates](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/quotations): construction, painting, electrical, interior design, AMC and security-services quotations.

## Popular for India
- [GST invoice format (Word/PDF)](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/invoices/invoice-gst)
- [Proforma invoice format](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/invoices/invoice-proforma)
- [No Objection Certificate (NOC) format](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/letters/letter-noc)
- [AMC quotation format](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/templates/quotations/quotation-amc)

## Guides
- [Document Templates Blog](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/blog): practical guides on invoices, resumes, contracts and proposals.

## Free tools
Browser-based utilities, no sign-up. See all at [Templix AI Tools](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/tools).
- Calculators & generators: GST/Tax calculator, discount calculator, profit-margin calculator, invoice number generator, freelance hourly-rate calculator, pricing calculator.
- PDF tools: merge PDF, split PDF, JPG↔PDF, PDF→JPG.
- Document generators: rent receipt generator (HRA, India), salary slip / payslip generator, proposal builder, contract generator, NDA generator, terms & conditions generator, letter generator, resignation & recommendation letters, resume ATS checker.

## Free AI tools
AI-powered writing and document tools. See [AI Tools](https://templix-ai.whitesparksoft.com/en/tools#ai).
- Writing: AI Writer, AI Rewrite (paraphraser), Grammar Checker, Humanize AI Text, AI Summarizer, Tone Changer, AI Translator.
- Career: Resume Summary Generator, AI Cover Letter Generator.
- Business: AI Proposal Generator, AI Email Generator, AI Business Plan Generator.
